# llms.txt - arifOS Machine Discovery

## Overview

arifOS is a constitutional kernel for AI agents, implementing a governance framework based on 13 floors of truth and verification.

## Repository

https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS

## Key Components

- **Kernel**: Constitutional rules (F1-F13)
- **MCP Server**: Runtime tool execution (arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com)
- **Sites**: Ring 1-3 (arif-fazil.com, arifos.arif-fazil.com, aaa.arif-fazil.com)

## Endpoints

- arifOS Kernel: https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS
- MCP Server: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com
- Documentation: https://arifos.arif-fazil.com
